dataset.name: Project_Cancer_Genes
dataset.description: A restricted genomic dataset containing annotated cancer-associated gene sequences and mutation profiles sourced from clinical research trials. Intended for use by authorized researchers in oncology and bioinformatics.
dataset.access_procedure: Access is restricted. Authorized users must submit a data access request form through the research portal and receive approval from the data governance board. Credentials are provisioned within 5 business days of approval. All access is logged and audited quarterly.

dataset.name: Project_Climate_Data
dataset.description: An open-access dataset aggregating global climate metrics including temperature anomalies, sea level measurements, and carbon emission indices from 2000 to 2025.
dataset.access_procedure: This dataset is publicly available. Users can download files directly from the open data portal without registration. A citation of the dataset is required in any published work. API access is available for bulk queries.
